title: Colorful Fire
description: Adds seven new fires for decorating your world or burning your enemies!
body:
Have you ever wanted more fires in more colors? Well here is seven of them! Each fire has a fire block, fire charge, campfire, lantern, torch, jack o' lantern, and two optional enchantments.

## Fires
- Redstone fire: A red flame that deals 1.5 damage and has a light level of 7.
  - Is ignited on redstone blocks
- Sun fire: A yellow flame that deals 1.5 damage and has a light level of 14.
  - Is ignited on yellow terracotta
- Indigo fire: An indigo flame that deals 1.5 damage and has a light level of 8.
  - Is ignited on lapis lazuli blocks
- Ender fire: A violet flame that deals 2 damage and has a light level of 3.
  - Is ignited on end stone
- Whimsy fire: A pink flame that deals 0.5 damage and has a light level of 15.
  - Is ignited on amethyst blocks and budding amethyst blocks
- Light fire: A white flame that deals 2 damage and has a light level of 15.
  - Is ignited on quartz blocks
- Night fire: A black flame that deals 2 damage and has a light level of 2.
  - Is ignited on blackstone blocks


Made using Prometheus API and Cobweb API.
